reviews.comment:
Buena atención. La confitería buena y todo muy limpio. Muy amable el personal, tanto del bar, como la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Great service. The pastry shop was good and everything was very clean. The staff were very friendly, both at the bar and at the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVNDdHd0NREAE

reviews.comment:
Estos lugares son especiales en su atención además de la. Limpieza y los beneficios

(Translated by Google)
These places are special because of their service, as well as their cleanliness and benefits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVdGRYc1hnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena limpieza de los baños. Almorcé una hamburguesa con papas fritas...buena carne.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean. I had a hamburger with fries for lunch...good meat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVcFlpMUd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Dentro de los ACA es muy moderno y cómodo
No tiene el encanto de los viejos ACA pero es muy funcional.

(Translated by Google)
Inside the ACAs, it's very modern and comfortable.
It doesn't have the charm of the old ACAs, but it's very functional.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVMmRlaDh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio tanto en la zona de playa y carga de combustible como en el bar de la estación. Para recomendar el sandwich de milanesa y el de crudo y queso en pan arabe tostado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the beach and fuel station, as well as at the station bar. I recommend the breaded steak sandwich and the ham and cheese sandwich on toasted pita bread.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVMmRIZUJnEAE
